lines: Three brass tags turn on square pins. Their marks show a broken circle, an opened ribcage, and a mouth drawn like a bell.
A counterweight cable disappears into the north wall. The board is its release.

choices.label: Set broken circle, opened ribs, bell mouth

effects.log: The third tag seats. A counterweight drops inside the north wall, and the stair door draws open.

choices.label: Set bell mouth, broken circle, opened ribs
Set opened ribs, bell mouth, broken circle
Read the marks as Host changes

lines: The cable lifts half a finger, then drops. Each tag turns back to its first mark. Nothing has jammed.
These are not causes of death. The clerk reduced changed bodies to the parts no burial sheet could hide.
Sister Monica bears the broken bone circle. Thomas Silo's ribs stand open. Susanna Niger's jaw holds the bell mark.

choices.label: Set the tags in grave order

effects.log: The marks align with the graves. The hidden counterweight opens the north stair.

lines: The three tags remain fixed in grave order. The counterweight cable is taut, holding the stair open.
